name: tyfys-mobile-shell
description: TYFYS mobile shell for iOS and Android using Capacitor

scripts.android:add: npm run build:web && npx cap add android
scripts.android:sync: npm run build:web && npx cap sync android
scripts.android:build:debug: npm run build:web && npx cap sync android && cd android && ./gradlew assembleDebug
scripts.ios:sync: npm run build:web && npx cap sync ios
scripts.ios:build:nosign: npm run build:web && npx cap sync ios && xcodebuild -workspace ios/App/App.xcworkspace -scheme App -configuration Debug -destination 'generic/platform=iOS' CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO build
